# Third-Party Assets

- PDF.js 6.0.227: Apache License 2.0. Loaded at runtime from jsDelivr.
- pdf-lib 1.17.1: MIT License. Loaded at runtime from jsDelivr.
- @pdf-lib/fontkit 1.1.1: MIT License. Loaded at runtime from jsDelivr.
- Noto Sans Bold: Copyright Google LLC, licensed under the SIL Open Font
  License 1.1. See `fonts/LICENSE-NotoSans.txt`.

Upstream sources:

- https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js
- https://github.com/Hopding/pdf-lib
- https://github.com/Hopding/fontkit
- https://github.com/notofonts/noto-fonts
